title: たづなさんの育成アドバイス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I arrive at work in the morning ready to
start the day, Tazuna Hayakawa, the director's
secretary, approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. It's finally time to start
working with your trainee, isn't it!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Together, you'll strengthen your bodies and
minds as you forge an inseparable bond. I'm
certain you'll have the most fruitful time together!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you're able to achieve consistent results, you
may even earn a G1 title, the very pinnacle of
racing!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Keep in mind that a runner's first three years in
the Twinkle Series are the most crucial.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If your trainee hasn't achieved a satisfactory
record three years after her debut...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid her contract with you may be canceled.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That makes these three years a critical period for
her! Please work together and find a way to make
it through.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
First things first, you should probably start
training for the upcoming Make Debut.
